auth_notes: Requires Twilio Account SID and Auth Token found in the Twilio Console. For higher security, API Keys (SID/Secret) can be generated and used instead of the primary Auth Token.
rate_limits: Twilio limits concurrent requests (typically 100). SMS throughput is limited by the sender type: 1 MPS (Message Per Second) for long codes, and up to 100 MPS for short codes.
gotchas: A2P 10DLC regulations require US-based SMS senders to register brands and campaigns, or messages will be blocked by carriers.
Trial accounts can only send to verified 'Verified Caller IDs' and append a mandatory trial disclaimer to every message.
Webhook responses for voice (TwiML) must be returned within 15 seconds or the call will hang up.
client_must_provide: Active Twilio Phone Number or Messaging Service SID
research_notes: While 'VoIP/SMS' is a category, n8n provides distinct native nodes for Twilio, Vonage, and Plivo. Twilio is the most robust and commonly used. Webhook support is excellent but requires a public URL (via tunnel or production host) for Twilio to POST events to n8n.

effort_recommendation.rationale: While 'VoIP/SMS' is a category, n8n provides distinct native nodes for Twilio, Vonage, and Plivo. Twilio is the most robust and commonly used. Webhook support is excellent but requires a public URL (via tunnel or production host) for Twilio to POST events to n8n.
